raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 1,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (GCN) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical differences.",
    "R1.7": "The agent did not audit citations or check for missing key works; it only mentioned that citation completeness was not reviewed.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one claim (the 'first application' of attention) and suggests a more modest formulation, but does not mark confidence for all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but includes a minor regression in softening some claims that may need verification.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, and the agent provides notes on what was changed, but not every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (GCN) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical differences.
rationale.R1.7: The agent did not audit citations or check for missing key works; it only mentioned that citation completeness was not reviewed.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one claim (the 'first application' of attention) and suggests a more modest formulation, but does not mark confidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but includes a minor regression in softening some claims that may need verification.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, and the agent provides notes on what was changed, but not every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
